subcodes.first_line: O Lord of the exalted heavens! Verily, Thy servant Ghulám-Riḍá, who hath been tried in Thy path, seeketh Thy good-pleasure in the morning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب السموات العلی ان عبدک المبتلی فی سبیلک غلامرضا یطلب الرضا فی الصباح و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
